surfaces.name: Synth API OpenAPI spec
surfaces.notes: Public Swagger 2.0 spec for the Synth API (48 unauthenticated GET endpoints — probabilistic price forecasts, market insights, leaderboards). The official synth-subnet README documents the API docs at api.synthdata.co/docs.

surfaces.name: Synth API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth REST API at api.synthdata.co exposing Synth's probabilistic price forecasts, leaderboards, and market insights; the /v2/leaderboard/latest endpoint returns JSON with no authentication. Documented in the official synth-subnet README.

surfaces.name: Synth latest validation scores dataset
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /validation/scores/latest on api.synthdata.co returning a JSON dataset of the latest per-miner, per-asset forecast validation scores for the SN50 Synth price-prediction network (miner_uid, asset, prompt_score, crps, scored_time, time_length). Documented as a security-free GET ("Validations - Latest Scores") in the subnet's registered OpenAPI spec at api.synthdata.co/swagger.json; distinct from the leaderboard subnet-api surface on the same host. Verified 200 application/json.
